# arifOS: Constitutional AI Governance Ecosystem + OpenClaw Runtime

> **Ditempa Bukan Diberi — Forged, Not Given**

arifOS is a production-grade governance layer for AI agents, now with OpenClaw runtime integration for sovereign VPS deployment.

## 🦞 OpenClaw Runtime (NEW)

OpenClaw brings constitutional agent runtime to your VPS:

- **Workspace**: `/root/waw` (Web Automation Workspace)
- **Primary Model**: MiniMax M2.7 (Self-Evolving, 1M context)
- **Fallbacks**: NONE (constitutional purity)
- **Embeddings**: Ollama bge-m3 (local, private)
- **Audio**: ElevenLabs TTS
- **Vision**: 19 vision-capable models
- **Gateway**: `127.0.0.1:18789`
- **Telegram**: `@AGI_ASI_bot`

### Constitutional Commands
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `/seal` | Archive session with F1-F13 manifest |
| `/new` | Hardened new session (auto-seals) |
| `/status` | Governance status |
| `/doctor` | Full diagnostic |

### Seal Package
```
~/.openclaw/sealed/SEAL-xxx/
├── transcript.jsonl
├── manifest.json (F1-F13, tri-witness)
├── audit.log
└── seal.txt
```

---

## ⚖️ Governance as a Service (GaaS)

External AI agents delegate reasoning to arifOS Kernel:
- **Delegation Protocol**: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/DELEGATION_PROTOCOL.md
- **Primary Hub**: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
- **OpenClaw Gateway**: http://localhost:18789 (VPS local)

---

## 🔗 Trinity Hubs

| Layer | URL | Purpose |
|-------|-----|---------|
| **Human** | https://arif-fazil.com | Sovereign profile |
| **Theory** | https://arifos.arif-fazil.com | Constitutional doctrine |
| **Runtime** | https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com | MCP server |
| **Agent** | `@AGI_ASI_bot` | Telegram interface |

- **ΔS (Entropy)**: Negative delta required for clarity
- **Ω₀ (Humility)**: Uncertainty band [0.03, 0.05]
- **κᵣ (Maruah)**: Empathy and dignity threshold
